hooks.command: PROJECT_DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; SKIP_MARKER="$PROJECT_DIR/.claude/.docs-sync-skip"; if [ -f "$SKIP_MARKER" ]; then rm -f "$SKIP_MARKER"; exit 0; fi; if [ ! -d "$PROJECT_DIR/.claude/docs" ]; then exit 0; fi; DIRTY="$(git -C "$PROJECT_DIR" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)"; if [ -z "$DIRTY" ]; then exit 0; fi; echo 'BLOCKED: Working tree is dirty and this project uses the claude-docs-mgmt framework (.claude/docs/ exists). Run /docs-sync first to capture session learnings + audit docs, then re-issue /compact. To skip this once (e.g. discarding WIP), run: touch .claude/.docs-sync-skip && /compact' >&2; exit 2
